ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of fund (e.g., ETF, Mutual Fund, Index Fund) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was launched */,
  "asset_under_management" REAL /* Current total value of assets managed by the fund */,
  "performance_fee" REAL /* Fee charged based on the performance of the fund */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Annual management fee as a percentage or fixed amount */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the fund (e.g., Active, Inactive, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector within the industry (e.g., Banking, Fintech) */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the holding belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the holding represents */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the company held */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the holding within the fund */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the holding was acquired */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the holding was acquired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the holding information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the holding (e.g., Active, Sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market data represents */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market data is for */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the company on the given date */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the company on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Analytics, Management) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
